moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are officially underway, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London, running until July 12.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Game, set, match! Wimbledon is LIVE from London, serving up two weeks of unmissable tennis action. Who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: London Local Angle
angles.copy: It's a big fortnight for London as Wimbledon takes centre court! The city is buzzing with tennis fever. Are you heading to SW19 or watching from home?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Incoming
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix weekend kicks off on Friday, July 3rd, with practice and qualifying leading up to the main race at Silverstone on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Race Weekend Build-Up
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is almost here, with practice and qualifying starting Friday at Silverstone, leading to Sunday's race. Who's your pick for the podium?

angles.name: F1 Fever
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go... almost! The British Grand Prix weekend is just days away. Time to get your F1 fix at Silverstone!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, with matches continuing throughout June and July, capturing the attention of football fans across the UK.

angles.name: Tournament Action
angles.copy: The World Cup action continues! Who's impressed you most so far and which team are you rooting for as the tournament progresses?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is gripping the nation! Every match is a talking point. What's been your favourite moment from the tournament so far?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancellation Still Buzzing
moments.blurb: London's Wireless Festival, originally scheduled for July 10-12, remains a talking point after its cancellation in April due to headliner Ye being denied entry to the UK.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: Still gutted about Wireless Festival being cancelled this year? The July 10-12 dates are a reminder of the big names we almost saw in London.

angles.name: London Music Scene
angles.copy: The Finsbury Park dates for Wireless Festival this July might be off, but London's music scene always finds a way. What other gigs are you hitting up?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, continues to deliver daily drama and romance from the Mallorca villa on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's giving you the most villa gossip?

angles.name: Summer TV
angles.copy: Love Island is our go-to summer TV fix! Are you hooked on the latest series and all the twists and turns?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's collaboration 'Rein Me In' is currently the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1, holding the top spot for the week ending July 2, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is officially the UK's Number 1 single. Have you been streaming it non-stop?

angles.name: New Music Reign
angles.copy: The UK Singles Chart has a new leader! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are at Number 1 with 'Rein Me In'. What's your favourite track on the chart right now?

moments.title: UK Braces for Another Heatwave
moments.blurb: Another heatwave is forecast for the UK, with temperatures expected to rise significantly from this weekend, potentially hitting 30-38C in parts of England and Wales over the next 10 days.

angles.name: National Heat Alert
angles.copy: Get ready to feel the heat! Another heatwave is on its way, with temperatures set to soar across the UK from this weekend. Stay safe and hydrated!

angles.name: Wales Heatwave
angles.copy: Wales is set for some scorching temperatures next week, with parts of the country potentially hitting 30C+. How are you planning to beat the heat?

angles.name: Devon Heatwave
angles.copy: Devon, get ready! Temperatures are forecast to climb, with some areas potentially reaching 34C+. Time to find those cool spots!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: Huey Lewis Tribute
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on July 5th! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Keeble
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Spandau Ballet Drummer
angles.copy: A huge Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble, the rhythmic force behind Spandau Ballet, on July 6th! What's your top Spandau track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning rapper and actor 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) turns 51 on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent on July 6th! What's your favourite track from the hip hop legend?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Chris Wood (Bastille)
moments.blurb: Chris Wood, drummer for the acclaimed British band Bastille, celebrates his 41st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Bastille Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 41st Birthday to Chris Wood, the brilliant drummer from Bastille, on July 6th! What's your favourite Bastille anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on July 7th! What's your favourite Ringo moment or Beatles track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 7th.

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega on July 7th! Which of her timeless songs is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Sledge
moments.blurb: Debbie Sledge, a founding member of the legendary disco and R&B group Sister Sledge, turns 72 on July 9th.

angles.name: Disco Diva
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 72nd Birthday to Debbie Sledge, one quarter of the iconic Sister Sledge, on July 9th! What's your ultimate Sister Sledge anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Marc Almond
moments.blurb: Marc Almond, lead singer of the pioneering synth-pop duo Soft Cell, celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the distinctive voice of Soft Cell, Marc Almond, on July 9th! What's your favourite Soft Cell classic?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jim Kerr (Simple Minds)
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, the charismatic frontman of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, turns 67 on July 9th.

angles.name: Scottish Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to Simple Minds' incredible frontman, Jim Kerr, on July 9th! Celebrate with your favourite Simple Minds hit!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Iconic rock musician and actress Courtney Love, known for fronting Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fearless Courtney Love on July 9th! What's your go-to Hole track or favourite Courtney moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, songwriter, and producer Jack White (The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, The Dead Weather) turns 51 on July 9th.

angles.name: Modern Rock Genius
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible multi-instrumentalist Jack White on July 9th! What's your favourite White Stripes song or one of his many projects?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Perrie Edwards
moments.blurb: Singer Perrie Edwards, best known as a member of the hugely successful girl group Little Mix, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Little Mix Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the amazing Perrie Edwards on July 9th! What's your favourite Little Mix anthem?
